semantic.role: Template for documenting the narrative purpose, audience, and key insights of a project document within the ArchSpine mirror system
responsibilities: Defining the document's purpose and intended audience
Summarizing key takeaways for quick reference
Providing a structured template for consistent documentation across the project
outOfScope: Technical implementation details of the ArchSpine system

English.purpose: This document serves as a template for creating standardized summaries of project documents within the ArchSpine mirror system. It ensures that every document clearly communicates its reason for existence, its target readers, and the essential points readers should retain.
English.context_and_audience: This template is intended for documentation architects, project maintainers, and AI agents who need to generate or interpret consistent document summaries. It is used across the ArchSpine project to maintain narrative coherence and facilitate both human reading and machine processing.
key_takeaways: Every document must state its purpose, audience, and key takeaways
The template enforces a consistent structure for all project documentation
Summaries support both human readers and AI agents through dual-format output (Markdown and JSON)

Simplified Chinese.purpose: 本文档作为模板，用于在 ArchSpine 镜像系统中创建项目文档的标准化摘要。它确保每份文档都能清晰说明其存在理由、目标读者以及读者应记住的要点。
Simplified Chinese.context_and_audience: 此模板面向文档架构师、项目维护者以及需要生成或解析一致文档摘要的 AI 代理。它在整个 ArchSpine 项目中使用，以保持叙事连贯性，并同时支持人类阅读和机器处理。
key_takeaways: 每份文档必须说明其目的、受众和关键要点
该模板为所有项目文档强制执行一致的结构
摘要通过双格式输出（Markdown 和 JSON）同时支持人类读者和 AI 代理
